text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Right. I was in the middle of the pack up till this
point, and then in the last stretch...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Do you need something, Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I was just a little curious...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's yesterday's scrimmage you're watching on
the computer, right? The one you ran in with
Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: YAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (My legs feel so heavy! I can't... make it...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She won, while I lost my speed in the latter
half and finished sixth. She utterly defeated me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But I won't lose next time... I can't.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You're so strong...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I was in a different race that day, and just like
you, I came in sixth... But I haven't managed to
get back on my feet.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But instead of letting this loss stop you, you're
still working hard and moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: How did you get to be as strong as you are?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm not strong. I'm just... determined.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have a goal that I must accomplish no matter
what, so I can't afford to stop in my tracks, even
if I lose or am in bad shape.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
In the past, people used to look up at the stars
with longing. But years of work have made it
possible to fly among them in space nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So long as you keep marching forward, you'll be
able to reach the stars one day, just like the
people who held fast to their convictions.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Do you have something like that too? Something
you can't give up on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later on...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I can't lose! For you, my other half—my sister... I
have to—)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega takes the win by a huge margin!
What an impressive turnaround from her last race!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your victory, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I agree. You looked like a shooting star flashing
through the night sky, bright and strong...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win my next race too! One day, I'm
going to shine as brightly as you and become a
real hero!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so.
